title: ranunculus flammula var. ovatus
intro: Ranunculus flammula var. ovatus, also known as creeping buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus flammula var. ovatus include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
